intent_precise: Thermocycler Example Protocol: With thermocycler module. (1) Close thermocycler lid. (2) Operate thermocycler. (3) Run thermocycler profile for profile:cycles cycles. (4) Set temperature to final_temp°C. (5) Open thermocycler lid.
intent: Start by closing the thermocycler lid and then operate the thermocycler to run the thermocycler profile for profile:cycles cycles. Once the cycling is complete, set the temperature to final_temp°C and open the thermocycler lid to access your samples.
